executive_summary: Platform is in full standby mode with zero call activity across all 9 verticals in the last 24 hours. All agent infrastructure is healthy and operational, but we're essentially running dark—no calls means no optimization data, no bookings, and no revenue activity to report.

sections.title: Call Performance
sections.content:
**Zero activity across the board.**

- **Total Calls:** 0
- **Bookings Created:** 0
- **Active Clients:** 0
- **Conversion Rate:** N/A

No calls means no data to analyze. We're ready to handle volume, but nothing's coming through the pipes.

sections.title: Agent Performance
sections.content:
**All optimizer agents idle—no changes made.**

With zero calls to analyze, none of our 9 vertical optimizers had material to work with:
- **Electrical, HVAC, Plumbing, Roofing, General Contractor, MedSpa:** Standing by
- **Marketing, Sales, Onboarding (internal):** No activity

Agents are ready to optimize the moment call data flows in.

sections.title: System Health
sections.content:
**All systems green—100% operational.**

✅ All 9 verticals passing health checks
✅ Prompts, rules, and templates intact
✅ Backups current
✅ No broken files or JSON errors

Infrastructure is solid. We're just waiting for traffic.

sections.title: Email & Invoices
sections.content:
**Minimal activity, clean delivery.**

- **Emails Sent:** 2 (both client briefings)
- **Delivery Rate:** 100%
- **Failed Sends:** 0

**Invoices:**
- **Total Outstanding:** $0
- **Overdue:** 0

Nothing requiring attention here.

sections.title: New Verticals
sections.content:
**No new verticals created this week.**

Creator agent has been quiet. Current roster of 9 verticals remains stable.

action_items: **Investigate call volume drop** — Zero calls in 24h is unusual. Check client integrations, phone routing, and whether this is expected downtime.
**Review client status** — With 0 active clients showing, confirm whether clients are paused, churned, or if there's a tracking issue.
**Consider test calls** — Run synthetic calls through each vertical to verify agents respond correctly when volume returns.
